title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Godrej Appliances - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Godrej Appliances - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Appliances are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Appliances:
Godrej Appliances is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
